allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project CountePreAlpha.xcodeproj -scheme Counter -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad Pro 13-inch \(M4\)' build)
Bash(git commit -m 'Organize models into semantic folder hierarchy *)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Organize models into semantic folder hierarchy' --body 'Restructures the Models folder with logical subfolders: *)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/TattooSession/Session/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomDiscount/Discount/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomSessionType/SessionType/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomGalleryGroup/GalleryGroup/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomEmailTemplate/EmailTemplate/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/InspirationImage/PieceImage/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/ImageGroup/SessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/\\.imageGroup/\\.sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/imageGroups/sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/sessionProgresss/sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(git commit -m 'Refactor models: simplify naming and improve structure *)
